evidenceSummary: Maine Track Program is for matriculated Tufts University School of Medicine students enrolled in the Maine community track. It is not a visiting program. Tufts SOM does not offer observerships for visiting students, and international students are explicitly not eligible per the Tufts away-rotation policy. Logged as REJECTED_NON_TARGET in p97_rejected_or_non_target_candidates.csv.
reviewerSelfAudit: Confirmed: every required field captured. 3 pages opened (≥ minimum 2 for non-teaching designation, but this is a medical school so teaching-hospital min applies — 3 ≥ 3 minimum); 7 search terms tried (≥ 3 core); UME/visiting-student/medical-student all populated; GME/department/residency/international-office/clinical-education absences explicitly explained as not applicable to a UME enrollment track. No forbidden umbrella shortcuts. The single rejected URL matches the Maine Track page logged as REJECTED_NON_TARGET in the rejected CSV.
